.metadata-container.background: rgba(230, 228, 218, 0.7) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-files-container .tree-item.background: rgba(184, 105, 44, 0.12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgba(217, 119, 86, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(238, 236, 226) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(217, 119, 86, 0.08) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.footnote-backref.footnote-link.background: rgba(217, 119, 86, 0.08) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.internal-link.is-unresolved[data-href=.background: rgba(217, 119, 86, 0.08) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(217, 119, 86, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(238, 236, 226) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(217, 119, 86, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(217, 119, 86, 0.15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgba(238, 236, 226, 0.94) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h1[data-heading=\"This is a heading 1\"].background: rgba(217, 119, 86, 0.2) linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h2[data-heading=\"This is a heading 2\"].background: rgba(184, 105, 44, 0.2) linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h3[data-heading=\"This is a heading 3\"].background: rgba(154, 134, 60, 0.2) linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h4[data-heading=\"This is a heading 4\"].background: rgba(121, 141, 93, 0.2) linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h5[data-heading=\"This is a heading 5\"].background: rgba(195, 102, 134, 0.2) linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h6[data-heading=\"This is a heading 6\"].background: rgba(119, 144, 136, 0.2) linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(245, 239, 224) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(214, 176, 123) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(223, 219, 209) linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(223, 219, 209) linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(174, 78, 54) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
